productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Blue washed denim jeans made of 100% cotton, has two insert pockets on the front with one zipped coin pocket, two patch pockets and one zippered pocket on the back, comfortable waistband with belt loops and brand patch on the waistband at the back, a loop extending from the pocket to the thigh at the back and metal zipper and button closure on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water with mild detergent Do not bleach Remove promptly and avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Your little one will look cool and casual in these distressed and washed blue jeans from gini and jony. The washed and frayed look gives an individual style, while the cotton fabric gives a fresh and comfortable feeling all day. Team it with a colourful tee.
